O - 1
R - 0
S - 4
E - 2

Q5 Not checked
General Aptitude • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • Expert • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Examine the following statements:
1. Rama scored more than Rani.
2. Rani scored less than Ratna.
3. Ratna scored more than Rama.
4. Padma scored more than Rama but less than Ratna.
Which of the following options is/are correct?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, d)
I : Rama > Rani
II : Ratna > Rani
III : Ratna > Rama
IV : Ratna > Padma > Rama
From the above Ratna > Padma > Rama > Rani

Q33 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Heating a steel specimen in furnace upto austenite temperature and then cooling slowly in the furnace is used to

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, c)
The above process is called annealing, which is used:
• To reduce hardness
• To improve machinability
• To increase or to restore ductility
• To relieve internal stresses
• To reduce or eliminate, structural inhomogeneity
• To refine grain size
